metadata.purpose: Granular DINOv3 quality thresholds for Phase 8.7+ QC validation
metadata.model: DINOv3 ViT-L/14 from Facebook AI Research

global_threshold.description: Minimum acceptable combined score across all features

face_consistency.description: Facial features match character reference (eyes, nose, mouth, bone structure)

lighting_consistency.description: Lighting style matches scene specifications (color temp, ratios, atmosphere)

composition_quality.description: Framing, rule of thirds, depth staging per ShotSpec

period_authenticity.description: No anachronisms (modern elements, wrong era props/costumes)

combined_score_formula.description: Weighted average of all granular scores
combined_score_formula.pass_condition: combined_score >= global_threshold AND all critical thresholds met

regen_with_stronger_reference_weight.description: Increase character reference influence in prompt

parameters.prompt_modification: Add 'exact facial features from reference' emphasis

regen_with_costume_emphasis.description: Add detailed costume description to prompt

parameters.prompt_modification: Prepend full costume description from character bible
Add color temperature, ratios, and source positions

regen_with_composition_emphasis.description: Add specific composition rules to prompt

parameters.prompt_modification: Add framing and composition technical specs

regen_with_period_constraints.description: Add explicit period constraints and forbidden elements

logging.log_format: {timestamp} | {shot_id} | face:{face_score} costume:{costume_score} lighting:{lighting_score} composition:{composition_score} period:{period_score} | combined:{combined_score} | {pass_fail}

phase_8_7_integration.description: How this integrates with existing Phase 8.7 pipeline
workflow: 2. DINOv3 scores each candidate with granular thresholds
3. Select highest scoring candidate that passes all critical thresholds
4. If no candidate passes, trigger failure_action based on lowest scoring feature
5. Regenerate with adjusted prompt, score again (max 2 retries)
6. If still failing, flag for human review

calibration_notes.face_threshold_0_92: Tested on 50 character shots, 92% ensures recognizable features
calibration_notes.costume_threshold_0_88: Allows minor variations while maintaining character identity
calibration_notes.lighting_threshold_0_85: Permits artistic interpretation within style guide
calibration_notes.composition_threshold_0_87: Enforces professional framing without being rigid
